summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IPO Assessment Module. All 17 features tested successfully. Backend APIs (14 tests) passed 100%. Frontend UI testing passed with one bug fixed (direct navigation to results page). AI-powered gap analysis using GPT-5.2 is working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Assessment landing page (/assessment) loads with features overview - PASS
2. 'Start Free Assessment' button visible with data-testid='start-assessment-btn' - PASS
3. Assessment wizard (/assessment/start) shows 5-step form with progress bar - PASS
4. Step 1: Company Info - Company Type (Private/Public), Target Board (SME/Mainboard), Reporting Unit (Crores/Lacs) - PASS
5. Step 2: P&L Data - 3 years of PAT, EBITDA, Revenue with tabs - PASS
6. Step 3: Balance Sheet - Total Debt, Cash, Net Tangible Assets (3 yrs), Net Worth (3 yrs), Depreciation, CapEx, Working Capital Change - PASS
7. Step 4: Projections - Growth Rate, WACC, Terminal Growth - PASS
8. Step 5: Market Data - Industry P/E, Peer P/E, Issue Type (Fresh/OFS/Both), Dilution % - PASS
9. Form validation requires all fields before proceeding to next step - PASS
10. Assessment results page (/assessment/results/:id) shows readiness score with visual indicator - PASS
11. Results page shows 4 calculator outputs: P/E Valuation (₹235 Cr), DCF Valuation (₹147.82 Cr), FCFE (₹8 Cr), Issue Size (₹47.85 Cr) - PASS
12. Results page shows SEBI eligibility check with pass/fail status for each criterion - PASS
13. Results page shows AI-powered gap analysis with Key strengths and Priority actions - PASS
14. Results page has CTA buttons to Match Maker, DRHP Builder, and Funding modules - PASS
15. Dashboard and Sidebar show IPO Assessment module as enabled (not 'Soon') - PASS
16. Backend API: POST /api/assessment/calculate returns all 4 calculator results + AI analysis - PASS
17. Backend API: GET /api/assessment/history returns user's assessment history - PASS
18. Backend API: GET /api/assessment/{id} returns specific assessment details - PASS
test_credentials: Session created via mongosh for test-user-assessment-* (cleaned up after testing)
seed_data_creation: None required - assessment data created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: IPO Assessment Module is fully functional. Key test IDs: assessment-page, start-assessment-btn, assessment-wizard-page, assessment-results-page, cta-matchmaker, cta-drhp, cta-funding. The module uses GPT-5.2 for AI gap analysis via Emergent LLM Key. Calculators: P/E (PAT × P/E), DCF (5-year FCF projections + terminal value), Issue Size (valuation × dilution %), FCFE (PAT + D&A - CapEx - ΔWC). SEBI criteria: Mainboard (NTA≥₹3Cr, OP avg≥₹15Cr, NW≥₹1Cr), SME (positive NW, 2yr profit). Fixed bug: AssessmentResults.jsx now properly handles direct URL navigation by transforming API response structure.

bugs_fixed.issue: Runtime error 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading status)' when navigating directly to results page via URL
bugs_fixed.root_cause: API response structure differs from wizard state - API returns 'results' object while component expected 'calculators' directly
bugs_fixed.fix: Added data transformation in fetchAssessment() to map API response structure to expected component structure, including calculating valuation_summary from stored calculator data

mainboard_criteria: Net Tangible Assets ≥ ₹3 Cr (each of last 3 years)
Net Worth ≥ ₹1 Cr (each of last 3 years)
sme_criteria: Positive Net Worth in all 3 years
Operational profit for at least 2 years
